But careful: operator_alignment_confirmed requires candidate_operator_linked, and compliance_validation_complete requires operator_alignment_confirmed, but does not require the link to persist after? But need to check if any later action needs the link. finalize_candidate_after_compliance_validation only requires compliance_validation_complete and not candidate_finalized. But note: goal also requires operator_alignment_confirmed, which is a predicate that remains true even if link is removed. So we can release.
